Home / Fortnite / Fortnite by Game Mode / Creative / Prefabs / Prefabs

Prefabs

Overview

Prefabs are buildings that can be instantly placed in Fortnite: Creative and Unreal Editor for Fortnite. Prefabs can be found in the Creative Inventory Menu or in the Content Browser through Unreal Editor for Fortnite. Below is a list of all available prefabs currently.

List of Prefabs

List of Prefabs[]

  • Recently Added
  • Full List (Categorized)
